generators.description: Generates a source hub and category pages with full source panels, syntax highlighting, annotations and source-category navigation. The generated category pages do not include a right-hand file navigation rail.

sourceBoundary: Generated documentation only. Canonical bundle source remains under .agent-operating-model/bundles/github/.
notes: Generated pages include warning banners that point readers back to the canonical source.
The static site is intentionally placed outside the canonical bundle directory.
The source panel pages are generated from canonical files and should not be hand-edited.
Source category pages use the full main content width for code panels and annotations.
The source hub and category pages are generated at build time from .agent-operating-model/bundles/github/.
